pr_text:
## Title: Fix type confusion in RLC UM callback function signatures

### Summary
The RLC UM reassembly logic uses callback functions to filter PDU segments based on sequence number criteria. The helper functions `less_than_vr_ur`, `outside_of_reordering_window`, and `less_than_vr_uh` were defined with concrete `rlc_entity_um_t *` parameters, but were being passed to `rlc_um_reassemble()` which expected a callback signature with `void *` entity parameter. This type mismatch created a subtle type
